title: Paradox Engine
subtitle: Two states. One truth. Hit when they agree.

ruleCard.hint: The Paradox Engine exists in two states. Only when both agree can it be damaged.

copyLayers.ruleCard: Two states. One truth. Hit when they agree.
copyLayers.codexSnippet: The Paradox Engine runs on contradiction. It is both true and false, on and off, alive and dead. The monkey learned that some problems are solved by waiting for them to solve themselves.
copyLayers.radioWhisper: Caller says the machine said 'this statement is false.' It's been thinking about it for three years.
